name: CarRush
description: Test your reflexes in Car Rush, the intense endless racer where one mistake ends it all! Navigate a relentless highway packed with unpredictable traffic. Earn coins to unlock a garage of supercars, each with unique handling and speed. Complete daily challenges, climb the global leaderboards, and prove you have the skill and nerve to become a racing legend. How long can you survive the rush?
instructions: TAP amp HOLD LEFT SIDE of the screen to steer your car to the LEFT TAP amp HOLD RIGHT SIDE of the screen to steer your car to the RIGHT Release to center the car Its intuitive and designed for quick reflexive gameplay
